title: BTS Releases 'ARIRANG' — First Group Album Since 2020
detail: BTS releases 'ARIRANG,' their 5th full-length studio album and first group release since 'BE' (Nov 2020). The 14-track album features lead single 'Swim.' Producers include Pdogg, Kevin Parker (Tame Impala), Flume, JPEGMAFIA, Mike WiLL Made-It, and Ryan Tedder. Within minutes of release, Day 1 Hanteo sales reach 3,981,507 copies — 1 million copies sold in under 10 minutes, an all-time record. All 14 tracks occupy the top 14 spots on Spotify's Global Top 50 simultaneously.

title: ARIRANG Sets K-pop Spotify Record: 110M Day 1 Streams
detail: ARIRANG accumulates 110 million Spotify streams on its first day — the highest single-day total for any K-pop album in Spotify history and 12th highest globally of all time. Apple Music tops charts in 115 countries and regions, setting a new record for highest daily streaming total by any artist on the platform.
